name: data_analyst
description: Creates interactive data visualizations (Plotly charts) and concept explainer artifacts (self-contained HTML) from research findings

skills.name: Data Visualization
skills.description: Creates interactive Plotly.js chart specs from quantitative research data
examples: Create a bar chart comparing transformer model sizes from 2017-2024

skills.name: Interactive Concept Explainer
skills.description: Generates self-contained HTML/CSS/JS artifacts that interactively explain concepts with animations, sliders, and draggable elements
examples: Create an interactive visualization of how self-attention computes weights
